highlights.description: Initial release of multi-agent panel discussion system with LiveKit integration

added.description: Multi-agent panel discussion system with coordinator and turn-taking
Panel agent with human and auto moderator modes
HeyGen avatar integration for visual representation
LiveKit room integration for real-time audio streaming
Support for Anthropic Claude and OpenAI LLM providers
Multi-provider TTS via omnivoice (OpenAI, ElevenLabs, etc.)
Dockerfile with multi-stage build and opus support
HTTP health endpoints for Kubernetes liveness and readiness probes
Panel recording support with LiveKit Egress
